title: Workshops/Symposiums * Youth Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Workshops/Symposiums * Youth Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF YOUTH ERA EUGENE DROP PEERPLUS PEER DELIVERED SERVICES TRAINING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides various trainings for service providers and community partners on youth/young adult issues and culture, collaborating with youth/young adults, peer-delivered services, how peer support works and how to integrate it, and how to bridge the gap between adult allies and youth/young adults. Also provides youth peer support specialist certification training (PeerPlus). Also provides trainings for youth/young adults on school-based peer-delivered services and for peer support specialists. 44 W 7th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Call for hours Email (541) 214-6514 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YOUTH ERA PEERPLUS PEER DELIVERED SERVICES TRAINING
